The option has been saved. A restart is: The option has been saved. A restart is required for it to take effect. Would you like to restart now?
Check XStreaming update, current version: Check XStreaming update, current version is:
Select video stream format, if you want: Select video stream format, if you want video fullscreen, please select Stretch or Zoom
If your device supports newer codecs, it: If your device supports newer codecs, it can reduce the video bandwidth requirements
Set the host streaming bitrate (Note: Hi: Set the host streaming bitrate (Note: Higher bitrate is not always better; the final bitrate will be determined by streaming negotiation)
Set the cloud streaming bitrate (Note: H: Set the cloud streaming bitrate (Note: Higher bitrate is not always better; the final bitrate will be determined by streaming negotiation)
If your controller supports vibration, y: If your controller supports vibration, you can set whether it vibrates during the game
trigger_rumble_description: Force controller trigger rumbled(Only work in Xbox one/s/x controller)
The signaling server is a server for str: The signaling server is a server for stream negotiation. If the host cannot connect, please try modifying this option
Changing the region allows you to use XG: Changing the region allows you to use XGPU services without a proxy
Please press the button on the controlle: Please press the button on the controller, which will be mapped to:
After successful mapping, this pop-up wi: After successful mapping, this pop-up will automatically close
If your joystick's maximum value doesn't: If your joystick's maximum value doesn't reach the expected level, you can set maximum value compensation
power_on_description: Choose whether to power on the console when streaming. By default, the console remains in sleep mode, and the power light won't turn on during streaming. Enabling this option will fully power on the host and may wake up the monitor
Gamepad_mix_desc: Enable this option if you want inputs from multiple gamepads to be merged
Audio_volume_desc: If the default maximum volume does not meet your expectations, you can choose to amplify the audio source here (Note: excessive volume may affect your hearing!)
native_mouse_keyboard_desc: Some games support native keyboard and mouse operation, you can enable this option
mouse_sensitive_desc: After enabling native keyboard and mouse, if the mouse sensitivity doesn't meet expectations, you can adjust the mouse sensitivity
background_keepalive_desc: Whether keepalive input when app is in background
value_vulkan_desc: Enabling Vulkan rendering can improve rendering performance on some devices, but may lead to instability (such as black screen, etc.)
FSR_desc: Enable FSR (FidelityFX Super Resolution) to achieve super-resolution, which can improve image clarity without increasing bandwidth, but will increase CPU/GPU load
MSALDesc: Enable device authorization login, allowing authentication via an external browser without entering account credentials in XStreaming
coop_desc: Enable local two-player mode, please connect two controllers
